en: The LORD spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they had come out of the land of Egypt, saying,
zh: 以色列人出埃及地以後，第二年二月一日，耶和華在西奈的曠野，在會幕裡對摩西說：

en: "Take a census of all the congregation of the people of Israel, by clans, by fathers' houses, according to the number of names, every male, head by head.
zh: “你們要把以色列全體會眾，按著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，統計人口；所有男丁，都要按著人口登記。

en: From twenty years old and upward, all in Israel who are able to go to war, you and Aaron shall list them, company by company.
zh: 在以色列中，凡是二十歲及以上，能出去打仗的，你和亞倫要按著他們的隊伍數點他們。

en: And there shall be with you a man from each tribe, each man being the head of the house of his fathers.
zh: 每一個支派要有一人幫助你們；他們每一個都是他父家的首領。

en: And these are the names of the men who shall assist you. From Reuben, Elizur the son of Shedeur;
zh: 以下就是幫助你們的人的名字：屬流本支派的，有示丟珥的兒子以利蓿；

en: from Simeon, Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai;
zh: 屬西緬支派的，有蘇利沙代的兒子示路蔑；

en: from Judah, Nahshon the son of Amminadab;
zh: 屬猶大支派的，有亞米拿達的兒子拿順；

en: from Issachar, Nethanel the son of Zuar;
zh: 屬以薩迦支派的，有蘇押的兒子拿坦業；

en: from Zebulun, Eliab the son of Helon;
zh: 屬西布倫支派的，有希倫的兒子以利押；

en: from the sons of Joseph, from Ephraim, Elishama the son of Ammihud, and from Manasseh, Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur;
zh: 約瑟的子孫中，屬以法蓮支派的，有亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪；屬瑪拿西支派的，有比大蓿的兒子迦瑪列；

en: from Benjamin, Abidan the son of Gideoni;
zh: 屬便雅憫支派的，有基多尼的兒子亞比但。

en: from Dan, Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai;
zh: 屬但支派的，有亞米沙代的兒子亞希以謝；

en: from Asher, Pagiel the son of Ochran;
zh: 屬亞設支派的，有俄蘭的兒子帕結；

en: from Gad, Eliasaph the son of Deuel;
zh: 屬迦得支派的，有丟珥的兒子以利雅薩；

en: from Naphtali, Ahira the son of Enan."
zh: 屬拿弗他利支派的，有以南的兒子亞希拉。

en: These were the ones chosen from the congregation, the chiefs of their ancestral tribes, the heads of the clans of Israel.
zh: 這些人是從會眾中選出來，都是他們宗族支派的領袖；他們是以色列的族長。”

en: Moses and Aaron took these men who had been named,
zh: 於是，摩西和亞倫帶著這些提名指定的人，

en: and on the first day of the second month, they assembled the whole congregation together, who registered themselves by clans, by fathers' houses, according to the number of names from twenty years old and upward, head by head,
zh: 在二月一日召集了全體會眾；他們就照著他們的宗族，按照他們的父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上的，都按著人口一一登記了。

en: as the LORD commanded Moses. So he listed them in the wilderness of Sinai.
zh: 耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西，摩西就怎樣在西奈的曠野數點了他們。

en: The people of Reuben, Israel's firstborn, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, head by head, every male from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:
zh: 以色列的長子，流本子孫的後代，照著宗族、父家，根據人名數目，按著人口，二十歲及以上，能出去打仗的男丁，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Reuben were 46,500.
zh: 流本支派被數點的，共有四萬六千五百人。

en: Of the people of Simeon, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, those of them who were listed, according to the number of names, head by head, every male from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:
zh: 西緬子孫的後代，照著宗族、父家，根據人名數目，按著人口，二十歲及以上，能出去打仗的男丁，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Simeon were 59,300.
zh: 西緬支派被數點的，共有五萬九千三百人。

en: Of the people of Gad, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:
zh: 迦得子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Gad were 45,650.
zh: 迦得支派被數點的，共有四萬五千六百五十人。

en: Of the people of Judah, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 猶大子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Judah were 74,600.
zh: 猶大支派被數點的，共有七萬四千六百人。

en: Of the people of Issachar, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 以薩迦子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Issachar were 54,400.
zh: 以薩迦支派被數點的，共有五萬四千四百人。

en: Of the people of Zebulun, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 西布倫子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Zebulun were 57,400.
zh: 西布倫支派被數點的，共有五萬七千四百人。

en: Of the people of Joseph, namely, of the people of Ephraim, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 約瑟的兒子，以法蓮子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Ephraim were 40,500.
zh: 以法蓮支派被數點的，共有四萬零五百人。

en: Of the people of Manasseh, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 瑪拿西子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Manasseh were 32,200.
zh: 瑪拿西支派被數點的，共有三萬二千二百人。

en: Of the people of Benjamin, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 便雅憫子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Benjamin were 35,400.
zh: 便雅憫支派被數點的，共有三萬五千四百人。

en: Of the people of Dan, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 但子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Dan were 62,700.
zh: 但支派被數點的，共有六萬二千七百人。

en: Of the people of Asher, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 亞設子孫的後代，照著宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Asher were 41,500.
zh: 亞設支派被數點的，共有四萬一千五百人。

en: Of the people of Naphtali, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
zh: 拿弗他利子孫的後代，照著他們的宗族、父家，根據人名數目，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的，都登記了；

en: those listed of the tribe of Naphtali were 53,400.
zh: 拿弗他利支派被數點的，共有五萬三千四百人。

en: These are those who were listed, whom Moses and Aaron listed with the help of the chiefs of Israel, twelve men, each representing his fathers' house.
zh: 以上就是被數點的人數，是摩西和亞倫，以及以色列的首領十二人 所數點的。

en: So all those listed of the people of Israel, by their fathers' houses, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war in Israel-
zh: 這樣，在以色列中，按著父家，二十歲及以上，凡是能出去打仗的以色列人，都登記了；

en: all those listed were 603,550.
zh: 被數點的，共有六十萬零三千五百五十人。

en: But the Levites were not listed along with them by their ancestral tribe.
zh: 只有利未人沒有按著他們家族的支派，數點在其中。

en: For the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 因為耶和華曾對摩西說：

en: "Only the tribe of Levi you shall not list, and you shall not take a census of them among the people of Israel.
zh: “只有利未支派，你不可數點，也不可把他們的總數列入以色列人中。

en: But appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of the testimony, and over all its furnishings, and over all that belongs to it. They are to carry the tabernacle and all its furnishings, and they shall take care of it and shall camp around the tabernacle.
zh: 只要派利未人管理法櫃的帳幕，和其中的一切器具，以及一切屬於帳幕的事物；他們要抬帳幕和其中的一切器具；他們要辦理帳幕的事，在帳幕四周安營。

en: When the tabernacle is to set out, the Levites shall take it down, and when the tabernacle is to be pitched, the Levites shall set it up. And if any outsider comes near, he shall be put to death.
zh: 帳幕要起行的時候，利未人要把它拆卸下來；帳幕要支搭的時候，利未人要把它豎立起來；如果有外人走近，必須處死。

en: The people of Israel shall pitch their tents by their companies, each man in his own camp and each man by his own standard.
zh: 以色列人安營，要依照他們的隊伍，各歸本營，各歸本旗。

en: But the Levites shall camp around the tabernacle of the testimony, so that there may be no wrath on the congregation of the people of Israel. And the Levites shall keep guard over the tabernacle of the testimony."
zh: 但利未人要在法櫃帳幕的四周安營，免得 神的忿怒臨到以色列的會眾；利未人要負看守法櫃的帳幕的責任。”

en: Thus did the people of Israel; they did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 以色列人就這樣行了，耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西，他們就怎樣行。
